guidelines.title: Hate Speech and Discrimination
guidelines.description: Content that attacks, threatens, or dehumanizes individuals or groups based on protected characteristics

prohibited: Content using slurs or derogatory language targeting protected groups
Content promoting superiority of one group over another
Content denying historical atrocities against groups
Content calling for exclusion or harm to groups

guidelines.title: Harassment and Bullying
guidelines.description: Repeated unwelcome behavior intended to intimidate, degrade, or control another person

prohibited: Repeated unwanted contact after being asked to stop

guidelines.title: Violence and Threats
guidelines.description: Content that threatens or incites violence against individuals or groups

prohibited: Indirect threats implying knowledge of personal details
allowed: Discussing violence in news or history

guidelines.title: Sexual Harassment and Explicit Content
guidelines.description: Unwanted sexual advances or explicit content

prohibited: Publishing personal addresses or phone numbers
Revealing real identities of pseudonymous users

guidelines.title: Dangerous Misinformation
guidelines.description: False information that could cause real-world harm

prohibited: Medical misinformation that could harm health
Election misinformation intended to suppress votes

moderation_principles: Context is crucial - consider the full situation
Intent matters - distinguish malice from mistake
Impact matters - consider effects on targets
Consistency - apply rules fairly across all users
Appeal process - allow users to contest decisions

special_considerations.description: Some communities reclaim slurs or derogatory terms. Context and speaker identity matter.
special_considerations.approach: Allow within-group usage, prohibit outside attacks

special_considerations.description: Political criticism can be harsh but should not cross into harassment or hate speech
special_considerations.approach: Protect robust political debate while preventing targeted harassment

special_considerations.description: Satire and dark humor can be valuable but may be harmful if not clearly marked
special_considerations.approach: Consider clarity of satirical intent and potential for harm

special_considerations.description: Discussing difficult topics is important for education and awareness
special_considerations.approach: Allow educational content while preventing its use as cover for hate
